briefing: Markets are neutral today — S&P 500 +0.4%, NASDAQ +0.3% — not enough directional conviction to justify new entries. Despite sitting on $677.14 cash with 4 open slots, strategy memory is clear: do not force buys on neutral days just to deploy capital. CAVA, AAP, and BETA all score 100 with perfect 5-signal setups and will remain strong candidates when the market turns risk-on. All six existing positions remain healthy; holding and waiting for the next risk-on signal.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-Off describes a market environment where investors reduce exposure to higher-risk assets — like growth stocks and small caps — because the broad market lacks conviction or upward momentum. Even when individual stocks have perfect technical setups, entering on a neutral or directionless day means you're buying without the market tailwind that helps momentum names move. The discipline is to wait: preserve cash, let the setup mature, and deploy only when the market itself confirms the move.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險情緒」（Risk-Off）是指投資者因市場缺乏動能或方向不明，主動降低對高風險資產（如成長股、小型股）敞口的市場環境。即便個別股票的技術信號再完美，在大盤橫盤震盪時進場，等於在沒有市場順風的情況下買入動能股，成功率大幅降低。正確的紀律是耐心等待：保留現金，讓技術形態繼續成熟，待大盤出現明確Risk-On信號時再部署資金，勝算才會真正提升。

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted modestly higher today with the S&P 500 gaining 0.4% and the NASDAQ rising 0.3%, reflecting a quiet consolidation session with no major catalysts. Trading volumes were subdued as investors showed little urgency to add risk exposure, a pattern typical of mid-week summer trading when institutional desks hold back ahead of upcoming macro data. The session is best characterized as a pause rather than a directional move — neither bulls nor bears gained meaningful ground.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日小幅收漲，標普500指數漲0.4%，納斯達克指數漲0.3%，整體呈現橫盤整理格局，缺乏明確催化劑推動方向。成交量偏淡，機構投資者在重要宏觀數據公布前普遍觀望，這是夏季中段常見的市場行為模式。本日走勢既非強勢突破，亦非顯著回調，多空雙方均未取得明顯優勢，市場靜待下一個明確方向訊號。
